title: feat(mockups): Create 5 inspired school mockup landing pages

areas.summary: Complete HTML landing page with cinematic dark design, red accents, full-bleed video hero, and compressed typography inspired by Aiglon College aesthetic.
Complete HTML landing page with navy-white-gold color scheme, pill buttons, and editorial typography inspired by Beau Soleil design language.
Complete HTML landing page with minimal structure and photography-forward layout inspired by Gordonstoun visual identity.
Complete HTML landing page created for Le Rosey school-inspired mockup design.
Complete HTML landing page created for Repton school-inspired mockup design.

notable: Five complete standalone HTML landing pages created for BISP using design inspirations from five prestigious international schools (Aiglon, Beau Soleil, Gordonstoun, Le Rosey, Repton), each with unique visual identity, full JavaScript interactivity, and responsive mobile layouts.

title: feat(mockups): Create 5 inspired school landing pages

areas.summary: Dark immersive design inspired by Aiglon College. Cinematic hero video, compressed typography, deep shadows, red accents. Full-featured landing page with multilingual support, scroll animations, and counter interactions.

Light editorial design inspired by Beau Soleil. Navy and gold palette, pill-shaped buttons, modular grid layout. Includes testimonials carousel, curriculum comparison cards, and admissions pricing section.
Highland-inspired design template for school landing page. Full-height video hero, responsive typography, grid-based layout structure for multi-section content organization.
Premium Swiss design aesthetic. Complete landing page template with navigation, hero section, and structured content areas for school presentation.
Classic British school design. Landing page mockup with traditional layout, navigation system, and hero section for institutional presentation.
Contemporary school design template. Responsive landing page with modern typography, grid system, and interactive elements for bilingual school positioning.

notable: Created 5 distinct HTML landing page mockups for BISP, each inspired by renowned international schools (Aiglon College, Beau Soleil, Gordonstoun, Le Rosey, Repton, Sevenoaks), demonstrating multiple design approaches for positioning a bilingual Paris school.
